zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Montgomery於1102年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親Arnoulf de Montgomery36歲，母親Lafracoth O'Brien26歲。他於1118年與Margaret of Dunbar在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1177年在蘇格蘭費伏桑頓享年75歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Montgomery于1102年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可时，他的父亲Arnoulf de Montgomery36岁，母亲Lafracoth O'Brien26岁。他于1118年与Margaret of Dunbar在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1177年在苏格兰費伏桑頓享年75岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Montgomery was born in 1102, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Arnoulf de Montgomery, was 36 and his mother, Lafracoth O'Brien, was 26. He married Margaret of Dunbar in 1118, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1177, in Thornton, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in England.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Montgomery est né en 1102, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Arnoulf de Montgomery, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lafracoth O'Brien, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of Dunbar en 1118, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1177, à Thornton, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Montgomery 1102 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoulf de Montgomery 36 und seine Mutter Lafracoth O'Brien 26. Er hat 1118 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Margaret of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Thornton, Fife, Scotland und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Montgomery è nato il nel 1102 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Arnoulf de Montgomery, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lafracoth O'Brien, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of Dunbar nel 1118, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1177, nel Thornton, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Montgomeryが1102年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Arnoulf de Montgomeryは36歳，母Lafracoth O'Brienは26歳であった。1118年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでMargaret of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1177年にスコットランドフィフソルントンで75歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Montgomery(이)가 1102년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoulf de Montgomery(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lafracoth O'Brien(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1118년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Margaret of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1177년 스컷랜드 피프 토른턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Montgomery nasceu em 1102, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Arnoulf de Montgomery, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lafracoth O'Brien, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of Dunbar em 1118, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1177, em Thornton, Fife, Scotland, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Montgomery родился в 1102 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Arnoulf de Montgomery было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lafracoth O'Brien, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of Dunbar в 1118 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1177 г. в местности таурнтон, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Montgomery nació en 1102, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Arnoulf de Montgomery, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lafracoth O'Brien, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret of Dunbar en 1118, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1177, en Thornton, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
